system.description:
A tome bound in ratskin that bears a jagged, glowing rune.

Curse. This spellbook contains one scroll each of @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.spells.Item.16XuBF2xjUnoepyp]{acid arrow} (pg. 54), @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.spells.Item.j2gvzfnMGQwxqgGg]{fireball} (pg. 60), and @UUID[Actor.2xHFafRF1iQUJUHj.Item.vTvKrv5VC2UQnrHM]{sleep} (pg. 71). When a wizard tries to cast or learn a spell from these scrolls, the spell targets the caster on a success.
